title: Maintenance Pro Cal
keywords: Free Maintenance Calculator with MTBF, MTTR, OEE, Downtime Cost, Reliability, PM Interval, Lubrication, Spare Parts, Availability and Maintenance Cost tools. Instant results with formulas and engineering explanations. — MTBF = Total Operating Time ÷ Number of Failures — MTTR = Total Repair Time ÷ Number of Repairs — OEE = Availability × Performance × Quality — Total Cost = Downtime Hours × (Lost Production Rate + Labor Rate + Other Costs) — PM Interval = MTBF × Safety Factor — t = (14×10⁶ ÷ (n × √d)) × Temperature Factor × Contamination Factor — ROP = (Avg Daily Usage × Lead Time) + Safety Stock,  Safety Stock = (Max Daily Usage − Avg Daily Usage) × Lead Time,  EOQ = √(2 × Annual Demand × Order Cost ÷ Holding Cost) — Total Cost = Labor + Parts + Contractor + Overhead,  % of RAV = (Total Cost ÷ RAV) × 100 — Availability (%) = (Total Scheduled Time − Downtime) ÷ Total Scheduled Time × 100 — R(t) = e^(−t ÷ MTBF),  F(t) = 1 − R(t)
